summary: Tested all 6 pricing fix scenarios from the review request. All tests passed: base_price=0 products correctly show 'Price on request' on detail pages, MIG-BOOKS shows BooksMigrationForm with $999 price, admin pricing rules JSON editor works, and catalog cards show correct pricing labels.
passed_tests: ✅ TEST 1: prod_hours_pack (base_price=0, calculator/hours_pack) detail page shows 'Price on request' (not $750)
✅ TEST 2: prod_dev_enterprise (base_price=0, tiered) detail page shows 'Price on request' (not $13,999)
✅ TEST 3: prod_migrate_books (MIG-BOOKS) detail page shows BooksMigrationForm with $999 estimated price preview
✅ TEST 4: Admin catalog - editing prod_migrate_books (which has pricing_rules={calc_type: books_migration}) shows 'Pricing Rules (Advanced)' JSON editor in Pricing tab
✅ TEST 5: prod_hours_pack catalog card shows 'Contact us' (base_price=0)
✅ TEST 6: prod_zoho_books_express catalog card shows 'Starts from $999' (tiered, base_price=null)
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.tsx: isRFQ logic correctly checks base_price === 0 explicitly. The condition `pricing !== null` ensures we wait for the pricing API before showing 'Price on request', which is correct behavior.

ProductForm.tsx: The pricing rules editor is only shown when `Object.keys(form.pricing_rules).length > 0`. This means products with empty pricing_rules={} won't show the editor - this is intentional and works correctly.
BooksMigrationForm.jsx: calculateBooksMigrationPrice correctly uses pricingRules.base_fee ?? 999 with proper fallbacks for all rate fields. Initial $999 price (1Y, QBO source, no premium) is correct.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pricing fixes are working. Login: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! with partner code 'automate-accounts'. Key: prod_hours_pack (base_price=0 calculator) and prod_dev_enterprise (base_price=0 tiered) both show 'Price on request' on detail pages. prod_migrate_books (MIG-BOOKS) shows BooksMigrationForm with $999 initial price from pricingRules.base_fee fallback. Admin pricing rules JSON editor visible for products with non-empty pricing_rules. One carry-over issue from iter_92: 'Migrate to Zoho Forms' (prod_migrate_forms) still shows no price on catalog card.
rca_of_issue: N/A - All tested scenarios pass. Previous issue: ProductDetail.tsx line 366 previously did not check base_price===0, so isRFQ was false for calculator products with base_price=0 (like hours_pack) and the API returned a non-zero total ($750). Fix: Added `product?.base_price === 0` check to isRFQ so these products always show 'Price on request' regardless of API-computed total.
